description: For-loop over files in the current directory
command:
for file in *; do
    echo $file found
done

description: Case statement on the first argument
Get exit status of the Nth command in a pipeline
Create a lock file (fails if it already exists)
command: ( set -o noclobber; echo > <lockfile> ) || echo 'Failed to create lock file'

lockfile.description: Path of the lock file to create
